heading: Allowances for States with emissions rates at or below 0.80 lbs/mmBtu
label: 7651e Allowances for States with emissions rates at or below 0.80 lbs/mmBtu

children.heading: Election of Governor
children.label: a Election of Governor
children.text: In addition to basic Phase II allowance allocations, upon the election of the Governor of any State, with a 1985 state-wide annual sulfur dioxide emissions rate equal to or less than, 0.80 lbs/mmBtu, averaged over all fossil fuel-fired utility steam generating units, beginning , and for each calendar year thereafter until and including 2009, the Administrator shall allocate, in lieu of other Phase II bonus allowance allocations, allowances from the reserve created pursuant to to all such units in the State in an amount equal to 125,000 multiplied by the unit’s pro rata share of electricity generated in calendar year 1985 at fossil fuel-fired utility steam units in all States eligible for the election.January 1, 2000section 7651d(a)(2) of this title

children.heading: Notification of Administrator
children.label: b Notification of Administrator
children.text: Pursuant to , each Governor of a State eligible to make an election under paragraph (a) shall notify the Administrator of such election. In the event that the Governor of any such State fails to notify the Administrator of the Governor’s elections, the Administrator shall allocate allowances pursuant to .section 7651b(a)(1) of this title1section 7651d of this titleSo in original. Probably should be “subsection”.1

children.heading: Allowances afterJanuary 1, 2010
children.label: c Allowances afterJanuary 1, 2010
children.text: After , the Administrator shall allocate allowances to units subject to the provisions of this section pursuant to .January 1, 2010section 7651d of this title
